name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.42: persistence safeguard. On Railway (or with REQUIRE_PERSISTENT_DB=1) the app now refuses to start instead of silently falling back to an ephemeral /tmp database when the volume is missing, so a detached volume fails loudly rather than serving an empty DB. /health now reports db.path and db.persistent. Cumulative over v5.41.
